title: chaenactis heterocarpha var. megacephala
intro: Chaenactis heterocarpha var. megacephala is a variety of the mountain whitetop, a flowering plant native to the western United States. It belongs to the daisy family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Chaenactis heterocarpha var. megacephala can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to address various health concerns.
